'''Entomancer''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} {{2|Monsters|Enemy}} found in {{2|Hive}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Entomancer|2}}
The Entomancer repeats a fixed three-move cycle: {{Int|Entomancer|Beeeees!||2}}, then {{Int|Entomancer|Spear!||2}}, then {{Int|Entomancer|Pheromone Spit||2}}, and back to the start.
